extraction.one_line_summary: ASGREEN Kasper bridged to EVENEPOEL Remco's late attack 1.7km out, then outsprint him after EVENEPOEL's earlier bonus-hunting moved ASGREEN into race-winning position.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL attacked after bonus sprint with BUCHMANN following, forcing Quick-Step to chase despite ASGREEN already positioned perfectly forward.
KRISTOFF dropped on final Hörnerschön circuit, suggesting overnight leaders vulnerable when multiple climbs compress peloton late.
Quick-Step controlled finale with four riders until EVENEPOEL solo move, then ASGREEN bridge reveals team willing to fragment own advantage.
Bonus sprint taken 20km out by LUTSENKO group fractured cohesion before final climb, isolating sprinters like ACKERMANN early.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: attacked multiple times in final 20km including KOM sprint and 1.7km move, showing aggression beyond years but lost sprint
rider_signals.ASGREEN Kasper: positive: bridged solo to EVENEPOEL 1.7km out after teammate's attack, perfect positioning judgment in chaotic finale
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: negative: dropped as overnight leader on final circuit climb, unable to defend in selective hilltop finish
rider_signals.ACKERMANN Pascal: negative: dropped before final circuits when pace lifted approaching Eisenach, confirming pure sprinters eliminated early on rolling finales
rider_signals.BUCHMANN Emanuel: positive: launched first counter-attack after bonus sprint forcing EVENEPOEL response, nearly created winning move
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: neutral: edged EVENEPOEL at penultimate KOM showing positioning instinct but faded before decisive moves
